title: Reoreganized
description: Reoreganized is a lazy fork of Oreganized to fix crashes and add support for Shield Expansion. Oreganized is a mod that adds new ores and metals to Minecraft.
body:
# DEPRECATED: Use the [original mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/oreganized) instead!

[![forge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/forge_vector.svg)](https://files.minecraftforge.net/) [![neoforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/neoforge_vector.svg)](https://neoforged.net/)

An exceptionally lazy fork of [Oreganized](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/oreganized) to fix a couple of crashes, namely with newer versions of [Shield Expansion](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/shield-expansion) and rare startup crashes.

***

[![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/social/discord-plural_vector.svg)](https://discord.com/invite/JcGRdT6Pbx) [![github-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/social/github-plural_vector.svg)](https://github.com/evanbones/Reoreganized)
